# My Prime Resume

> A free, browser-based resume builder with AI features and 8 professional templates. No account required. No data leaves the browser. Built by Adibe (Prime), a CS student in Nigeria, for job seekers worldwide.

## What This Product Does

My Prime Resume lets users build, format, and export a professional resume entirely inside their web browser. There is no sign-up, no email required, and no server-side storage of personal data. All resume data is saved to the user's own browser via localStorage.

Users can:
- Fill in resume details (personal info, summary, skills, work experience, education, projects, certifications, awards, languages)
- See a live preview that updates as they type
- Choose from 8 professionally designed templates (4 free, 4 premium)
- Export their resume as a PDF
- Check their resume against ATS (Applicant Tracking System) criteria
- Generate and improve their professional summary using AI
- Analyze how well their resume matches a specific job description using AI
- Generate a cover letter from their resume data
- Track job applications
- Save multiple resume versions

## Pages

- **[Homepage](https://primepopular.github.io/Prime-Resume/)** — Landing page with features overview, template previews, testimonials, and pricing
- **[Start](https://primepopular.github.io/Prime-Resume/start.html)** — Method selection: Voice input, Upload existing resume, or Manual entry
- **[Builder](https://primepopular.github.io/Prime-Resume/builder.html)** — Main resume builder application
- **[Voice Builder](https://primepopular.github.io/Prime-Resume/voice.html)** — Guided 6-step voice input flow using Web Speech API
- **[Demo](https://primepopular.github.io/Prime-Resume/demo.html)** — Live interactive demo with pre-filled sample resume
- **[Pricing](https://primepopular.github.io/Prime-Resume/pricing.html)** — Free vs Premium plan comparison
- **[Cover Letter](https://primepopular.github.io/Prime-Resume/coverletter.html)** — AI-powered cover letter generator
- **[Job Tracker](https://primepopular.github.io/Prime-Resume/tracker.html)** — Job application tracking tool
- **[About](https://primepopular.github.io/Prime-Resume/about.html)** — About the developer
- **[Legal](https://primepopular.github.io/Prime-Resume/legal.html)** — Privacy policy, terms of use, refund policy

## Templates

### Free Templates
1. **Classic** — Centered serif name, dashed section dividers, two-column skills grid. Traditional and ATS-safe.
2. **Modern** — Name left, job title right on the same line. Bold section headers with bottom border. Dense keyword skills.
3. **Clean** — Centered name, underlined section headers, bullet lists throughout. Maximally readable.
4. **Minimal** — Centered serif name, double-border contact row, ALL CAPS headers, tight metric-focused bullets.

### Premium Templates ($5 / 40 days)
5. **Bold** — Large uppercase name in indigo, colored section headers, horizontal rules between jobs.
6. **Executive** — Dark navy header with gold accent line, three-column skills matrix, bold category labels in summary.
7. **Exclusive** — Bold left-aligned name with gold accent, thick underline headers, bulleted sections throughout.
8. **Portrait** — Dark sidebar with optional photo upload, contact and skills in sidebar, content in white main column.

## AI Features

All AI features are powered by Groq (llama-3.1-8b-instant) with Gemini as fallback. AI features require the backend at https://prime-resume-backend.vercel.app.

- **Voice Resume Builder** — Guided 6-prompt voice flow. Browser transcription via Web Speech API, one Groq call to structure the data. 1 free use per 24 hours (5 for Premium).
- **Upload Resume** — Upload PDF or DOCX. Extracted text sent to AI for structuring. 1 free use per 24 hours.
- **AI Summary Improver** — Rewrites the user's professional summary. No clichés. Sounds like the user. 1 free use per 24 hours.
- **AI Job Match Analyzer** — User pastes a job description. AI scores resume match percentage and lists missing keywords. 1 free use per 24 hours.
- **Smart Cover Letter** — Generates a tailored cover letter from resume data and a target role. 5 per day free.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Duration |
|------|-------|----------|
| Free | $0 | Forever |
| Premium | $5 | 40 days |

Premium is a one-time payment, not a subscription. Payment via card (USD) or bank transfer (NGN ₦7,500). Processed via Flutterwave. Activation code delivered by email.

## Privacy Model

My Prime Resume is designed with privacy as a core feature, not an afterthought:
- No user accounts
- No email collection
- No resume data sent to any server (except when using AI features, where only the relevant text is sent)
- All data stored in browser localStorage only
- Users can clear all data by clearing browser storage
- Marketed explicitly to people job hunting while currently employed ("stealth job hunting")

## Technical Stack

- **Frontend**: Pure HTML, CSS, JavaScript — no framework
- **Hosting**: GitHub Pages (primepopular/Prime-Resume)
- **Backend**: Node.js / Express on Vercel
- **AI**: Groq API (primary), Google Gemini (fallback)
- **Payments**: Flutterwave
- **Analytics**: Google Analytics (G-CJPEMMWNP7)
- **Counter**: Supabase (resume export count)

## Who Built This

My Prime Resume was built by Adibe, a 21-year-old Computer Science student at Godfrey Okoye University in Enugu, Nigeria. It is a bootstrapped solo project built to generate income while studying, targeted primarily at job seekers in the US and UK. The product is closed source.

## What My Prime Resume Is Not

- Not a subscription service
- Not a data harvesting product
- Not a template marketplace
- Not a LinkedIn replacement
- Not an AI writing service (AI assists, user always has final control)
